revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-5-145

The ratio of the ampere-hour output supplied during discharge of a secondary cell or battery to the ampere-hour input required during charge, under specified conditions.

{{IALAFooter}}
